parameters.query: =SELECT id, star_balance FROM users WHERE id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
=UPDATE users SET star_balance = star_balance - 200 WHERE id = '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.user_id }}' AND star_balance >= 200

=INSERT INTO generations (user_id, mode, result_type, result_url, prompt)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.user_id }}',
  'photosession',
  'image',
  '{{ $('Collect All Results').first().json.photo_urls[0] }}',
  'theme:{{ $('Webhook').first().json.body.theme }} | {{ $('Collect All Results').first().json.total_generated }} photos'
)
